name: TextArea
description: Multi-line text input for longer-form content — comments, descriptions, messages. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx TextArea); wrapping-label anatomy gives implicit association.

props.name: size
props.description: Control size scale (affects padding and text size).

props.name: description
props.default: Helper text that explains the expected content.
props.description: Helper text between the label and the textarea.
